=== CRYPTO PORTFOLIO RUN — 2026-07-01 PM ===  (data: pre-pulled afternoon, ~13:22 PDT)

SOL confirmed its EMA20 breakout today — the trigger we've been watching for three days finally fired, upgrading it to a buy. ETH also crossed its momentum floor (RSI cleared 40 this afternoon) and qualifies as a buy, though it's borderline: any daily close back below RSI 40 reverts it to hold. BTC staged a dramatic intraday recovery — its momentum indicator swung from -55 to +33 after bouncing off $57,800 — but its RSI is still 37, so it stays on hold until RSI clears 40 with confirmation.

=== BLOCK 2 — Per-Token Verdicts ===

### BTC — HOLD
BTC bounced hard off $57,800 and recovered to $59,978 — its MACD histogram swung from -55.06 this morning to +32.55 this afternoon, the most dramatic intraday momentum reversal of this cycle. That may signal capitulation exhaustion: sellers who pushed the MACD to its worst reading ever may have been absorbed. But RSI at 37.00 is still below the 40 threshold required for Druckenmiller's bearish gate to clear, and the death cross remains active. Wait for RSI to cross 40 and MACD momentum to confirm before acting.

Research Desk:
  Technical:   $59,978. Below all MAs (EMA20 ~$66,589, SMA200 ~$75,558, 200wMA $62,640). Death cross active. RSI 37.00 (improved from 30.22 this morning but still below the 40 threshold). MACD hist +32.55 — massive intraday reversal from -55.06 (capitulation/exhaustion signal). -37.7% from 52w high. Bounced off $57,800 intraday.
  On-Chain:    $59,978 = 95.9% of 200wMA ($62,640) — above the historical cost-basis floor after dipping below it. Closes reclaiming this floor historically mark trough zones, but confirmation requires RSI recovery [source: TradingView data].
  DeFi:        n/a — L1 (no protocol revenue accrual to token holders)
  Macro:       Spot bitcoin ETFs shed $4.5 billion in June — worst month since January 2024 launch. BlackRock IBIT alone shed $3.55 billion. Nine-day outflow streak, $222.6M on June 30 alone [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406802/bitcoin-etf-worst-month-yet]. Taiwan passed the Virtual Asset Service Act on July 1 — a constructive long-run regulatory signal [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406816/taiwan-passes-crypto-law].
  Smart Money: Strategy buyback program ongoing; Ark Invest loaded crypto-adjacent equities (Coinbase, Circle, Robinhood) — indirect accumulation signal, not direct BTC [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406628/ark-invest-coinbase-circle-bullish-robinhood-monday].

Panel:
  Graham (Value):          NEUTRAL — 95.9% of 200wMA; not cheap enough (<80% threshold unmet); no cash-flow anchor.
  Buffett (Quality):       NEUTRAL — dominant monetary network moat but no revenue to underwrite a buy.
  Dalio (Cycle):           BEARISH — ETF outflow record ($4.5B June), hawkish Fed, strong DXY = textbook risk-off/tightening.
  Druckenmiller (Trend):   BEARISH — RSI 37.00 < 40 ✗ (gate still fails); death cross active; MACD +32.55 is a recovery signal but RSI must cross 40 first.
  Burniske (On-chain):     NEUTRAL — no protocol fee capture; valued purely on monetary premium.

Bull: MACD capitulation reversal (+32.55 from -55.06) + bounce off $57,800 in Extreme Fear (F&G 11) = classic pattern for a cycle trough. The worst may be behind us.
Bear: RSI 37 and death cross remain active; wait for RSI>40 + MACD confirmation before acting. No liquidity or macro catalyst has changed.

### ETH — BUY ⚠️
ETH's RSI crossed 40 this afternoon — the key threshold that upgrades Druckenmiller from BEARISH to NEUTRAL and lifts the quorum from SPLIT to BULLISH. Combined with its MACD now at +5.24 (vs +2.42 this morning) and zone qualification at 65.3% of its 200-week average (FAIR_VALUE, 210 bars), the signal rules produce a BUY. However, at RSI 40.33 the margin is thin — a single daily close below 40 reverts Druckenmiller to BEARISH, collapses the quorum to 3/2 SPLIT, and reverts the signal to HOLD. Size smaller than AAVE or SOL; treat this as an early accumulation tranche, not a full commitment.

Research Desk:
  Technical:   $1,615.71. Below EMA20 $1,824.80 and 200wMA $2,471. RSI 40.33 — just crossed the 40 threshold (was 34.32 this morning). MACD hist +5.24 (accelerating from +2.42 this morning). -67.2% from high. Note: price remains well below EMA20; the BUY is qualified by quorum + zone, not by Druckenmiller gate (RSI 40-50 = NEUTRAL, not BULLISH).
  On-Chain:    $1,615.71 vs estimated 200wMA $2,471 = 65.3% → FAIR_VALUE zone ✓. 210 weekly bars ✓. Ethereum TVL $37.94b, fees $251,555/24h carried from prior confirmed session [source: https://defillama.com/chain/ethereum].
  DeFi:        Settlement layer for $37.94b TVL; EIP-1559 burn + staking yield structurally accrue value to holders [source: https://defillama.com/chain/ethereum].
  Macro:       ETH MACD diverging aggressively positive vs BTC intraday — relative-strength accumulation pattern. UK FCA crypto framework (Oct 2027 authorization regime) is long-term institutional positive for ETH-based DeFi/RWA infrastructure [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406546/uk-sets-capital-market-abuse-rules-landmark-crypto-framework]. Taiwan crypto law passed July 1 adds a second major jurisdiction [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406816/taiwan-passes-crypto-law].
  Smart Money: Bitmine holds 5.70M ETH (4.7% of supply, $8.9B) — structural float tightener [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406538/bitmine-lifts-ethereum-treasury-to-5-7-million-eth-through-challenging-weekly-slide-joins-russell-1000]. Securitize NYSE debut this week — RWA tokenization tailwind for ETH ecosystem [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406634/securitize-nyse-debut-thursday].

Panel:
  Graham (Value):          BULLISH — 65.3% of 200wMA with -67.2% drawdown + real fee/burn anchor = genuine margin of safety.
  Buffett (Quality):       BULLISH — dominant programmable-settlement moat with real fee revenue and accelerating institutional treasury absorption (Bitmine 4.7% of supply).
  Dalio (Cycle):           BEARISH — high-beta asset into a tightening, strong-dollar, ETF-outflow regime.
  Druckenmiller (Trend):   NEUTRAL — RSI 40.33 (above 40 so no longer BEARISH, but below 50 so not BULLISH); MACD hist +5.24 ✓; price $1,615 < EMA20 $1,824 ✗. 1/3 gates met — upgraded from BEARISH to NEUTRAL this afternoon.
  Burniske (On-chain):     BULLISH — EIP-1559 burn + staking yield distribute real value to holders at a compelling discount.

Bull: Deep discount (65.3% of 200wMA), Bitmine absorbing 4.7% of supply, MACD accelerating positive, RWA/tokenization tailwinds; BUY per signal rules (quorum + zone).
Bear: Druckenmiller NEUTRAL, not BULLISH — RSI 40.33 is razor-thin margin above the 40 threshold; price 11% below EMA20. Any close below RSI 40 reverts to HOLD. Treat as half-size vs AAVE/SOL.

⚠️ BORDERLINE FLAG: Daily RSI close below 40 → Druckenmiller reverts BEARISH → quorum becomes 3/2 SPLIT → signal reverts to HOLD.

★ KEY CHANGE: SOL reclaimed its EMA20 today — Druckenmiller gate met for the first time. Upgraded from HOLD ★watch to BUY.

  Macro:       High-beta into risk-off; Taiwan/UK frameworks represent long-run tailwinds for oracle infrastructure as regulated DeFi expands [source: https://www.theblock.co/post/406816/taiwan-passes-crypto-law, https://www.theblock.co/post/406546/uk-sets-capital-market-abuse-rules-landmark-crypto-framework].
  Smart Money: Enterprise/TradFi integrations (Swift, JPM, UBS) + service-fee buyback underpin long-term demand. No new institutional news today. MACD micro-turn (+0.002) is a watch signal, not an action signal.

Bear: RSI <40 keeps Druckenmiller explicitly BEARISH; +0.002 MACD is noise, not signal. SPLIT holds until RSI >40 with momentum confirmation.

📊 *Crypto Portfolio — July 1, 2026 (afternoon update)*

Two signals fired this afternoon that weren't there this morning.

**SOL just crossed its moving average trigger** at $76.67 — the level we've been watching for three days. All three momentum conditions are now satisfied. This is a full buy, not a starter position.
🟢 **SOL** — upgraded to buy today. Entry at current levels ($76–77). Death cross still active so size in tranches; the signal is real but the macro is still rough.

**ETH crossed its momentum floor** (RSI cleared 40) and technically qualifies as a buy — but it's razor thin. RSI is 40.33 and any pullback below 40 reverts it to hold. Treat it as a half-sized early accumulation, not a full commitment.
🟡 **ETH** — borderline buy. Half the size of AAVE or SOL. If RSI slips below 40 on today's close, wait.

**Already open (unchanged):**
🟢 **AAVE** — $85.43, all conditions intact, highest conviction. EMA support at $82.

**BTC recovery — notable but not actionable yet:**
